description: Go CLI tool that directly calls language.Parse() from golang.org/x/text v0.3.7, triggering CVE-2022-32149 ReDoS vulnerability via crafted language tags.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: main.go directly calls language.Parse() with user-supplied input from os.Args[1]

findings.human_justification: language.Parse() is called directly in main() with untrusted user input from os.Args, making the ReDoS vulnerability exploitable.
